name: The Arc of Missouri
description: State chapter of The Arc advocating for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities across Missouri.

name: Missouri First Steps Early Intervention
description: Missouri's early intervention program providing services for infants and toddlers with developmental delays from birth to age 3.

name: Special Olympics Missouri
description: Year-round sports training and athletic competition for Missourians with intellectual disabilities.
address: 305 Special Olympics Dr., Jefferson City, MO 65101

name: St. Louis Children's Hospital - Developmental and Behavioral Pediatrics
description: Comprehensive developmental and behavioral pediatric evaluations and treatment at a nationally ranked children's hospital.
address: One Children's Place, St. Louis, MO 63110

name: Missouri Protection and Advocacy Services (Mo P&A)
description: Missouri's designated protection and advocacy organization providing legal advocacy for people with disabilities.
address: 925 S. Country Club Dr., Jefferson City, MO 65109

name: Missouri Assistive Technology
description: Statewide program providing assistive technology information, device demonstrations, and loans for Missourians with disabilities.

name: Missouri ABLE Account (MOABLE)
description: Tax-advantaged savings accounts for eligible Missourians with disabilities to save without affecting means-tested public benefits.

name: Missouri Division of Developmental Disabilities
description: State agency administering services and supports for Missourians with developmental disabilities.

name: Camp Barnabas
description: Week-long summer camp for children and young adults with special needs and chronic illnesses featuring outdoor activities and one-on-one buddies.

name: Missouri Parents Act (MPACT)
description: Missouri's parent training and information center providing support, resources, and advocacy for families of children with disabilities.

name: Missouri Vocational Rehabilitation
description: State vocational rehabilitation services helping Missourians with disabilities prepare for and obtain employment.

name: Missouri Medicaid HCBS Waivers
description: Medicaid waiver programs funding home and community-based services for Missourians with disabilities.

name: Metro Transit (St. Louis) Call-A-Ride Paratransit
description: ADA paratransit service providing door-to-door transportation for eligible riders with disabilities in the St. Louis metro area.

name: SSM Health Cardinal Glennon Children's Hospital - Therapy Services
description: Pediatric occupational, physical, and speech therapy services for children with developmental delays and disabilities.
address: 1465 S. Grand Blvd., St. Louis, MO 63104
